name: Chicken Ya Ya
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Arrange the chicken halves in an eight inch baking dish sprayed with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Combine the salt, red pepper flakes, chili powder and paprika; mix well and sprinkle over the chicken. Set aside.
4. In a medium skillet over high heat, melt the margarine. Add the onions, bell pepper and celery; sauté, stirring constantly for five minutes.
5. Add all the remaining ingredients to the skillet. Cook, constantly stirring, for five more minutes, or until the sauce thickens.
6. Remove from the heat and pour over the chicken.
7. Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
8. Turn the chicken over and baste with the sauce.
9. Bake, uncovered, for 30 minutes longer, or until the chicken is tender, basting often.
